forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. The chance of fog this morning, mainly on the western slopes. Slight chance of a shower on the eastern slopes this morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 19 and 24.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. The chance of fog on the eastern slopes in the early morning. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting south to southeasterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog on the eastern slopes. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending north to northeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

The chance of fog in the early morning. Mostly sunny day. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting south to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon and evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

The chance of fog in the early morning. Mostly sunny day. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early morning then tending northerly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Sunny. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northeasterly during the morning then tending northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog near the coast. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h shifting south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog near the eastern border. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
No Rating
Sun protection 10:00am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h shifting south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Cloud clearing. The chance of fog near the eastern border early this morning. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. The chance of fog in the morning, mainly in the west. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending northeasterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending northeasterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly during the day then tending southeast to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending northeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly in the early afternoon then tending northeast to southeasterly in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to high 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. The chance of fog in the south in the early morning. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Cloud clearing. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Sunny. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 31.
Sunny. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]
Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 31.

Sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning then becoming northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Sunny. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending east to northeasterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 31.
Cloud clearing. Patchy morning fog east of Ceduna. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures 26 to 31.
No Rating
Sun protection 10:00am to 3:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Nullarbor in the evening. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 30 to 45 km/h early in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.

Mostly sunny. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then tending east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 30.
Sunny. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southeasterly in the early afternoon then tending northeast to southeasterly in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures 23 to 28.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

The chance of fog in the early morning. Mostly sunny day. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 25 to 35 km/h in the early morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.

Mostly sunny. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting south to southeasterly during the day then tending east to southeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Sunny. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending easterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures 21 to 26.
No Rating
Sun protection 10:10am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.

Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Sunny afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting southerly during the morning then tending southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.

Sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.

Sunny. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly in the middle of the day then tending east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 30s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 3:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]
Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching 30 to 35.

Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.
Sunny. Winds northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to northeasterly in the middle of the day then tending east to southeasterly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
